title: Create: Quark Runes
description: Adds a sequened recipe to allow you to create the runes from the quark mod!
body:
## This is a simple mod to add a recipe to the runes in the [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) mod
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d1852733ff56886e4d44ad457cd62d44ffa00c3.png)

### Requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
# Ports
- Fabric : [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) is a forge only mod so unless they port to fabric I cannot port it to fabric
- 1.19.2+ : I will be porting it to version beyond 1.19.2 when I am able to, 1.20.1 port is here and any versions in between will only be added by request by asking in [curseforge comments](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-quark-runes)
- 1.19.2- : I'll be porting it to the requested version, you can ask in my [curseforge comments](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-quark-runes)

**You can use this mod in your modpacks as long as it stays on curseforge or modrinth**

Unfortunately I have to go out my way to say this: This mod is **ONLY on modrinth or curseforge**, NO other sites have a trusted download on this mod.
